description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional couch with a pixelated blue-gray patterned upholstery, accompanied by a rectangular coffee table with a glass top and wooden legs. The couch features a right-side chaise extension, providing ample seating space and a contemporary silhouette. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the frame, giving the couch a streamlined and blocky appearance. The armrests are straight and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the geometric design. The coffee table has a transparent glass surface supported by four dark wooden legs, with a few scattered white and brown decorative elements visible beneath the glass. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban living rooms, lobbies, or waiting areas.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional couch with blue-gray pixelated upholstery and a glass-topped wooden coffee table, featuring integrated cushions and straight armrests.
description_view_0: The back of the L-shaped couch is visible, showing the continuous pixelated upholstery and the top edge of the glass coffee table.
description_view_1: The left side of the couch and the full glass coffee table are visible, highlighting the chaise extension and the table's wooden legs.
description_view_2: The front of the couch and coffee table are visible, clearly showing the L-shape, integrated cushions, and the transparent glass tabletop.
description_view_3: The right side of the couch is visible, emphasizing the chaise section and the side profile of the coffee table.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Integrated seat and back cushions form a continuous surface, with no visible loose or accent pillows; the chaise section extends the seating area.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Pixelated, checkered pattern in varying shades of blue-gray, giving a blocky, digital appearance.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style legs in dark wood, exposed and minimally visible beneath the couch and coffee table.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, rectangular armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered in the same patterned fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest integrated with the seat, non-tufted and fully upholstered in the same pixelated pattern.
